title: Document extractions
description: A provenance record: one domain row (a lab result, a metric, a medication…) that the records/analyst derived from an uploaded document, so every derived row traces back to its source file and re-analysis stays idempotent.

documentId.description: the source document this extraction came from

targetTable.description: which domain table the derived row was written to, e.g. 'lab_results' | 'metrics' | 'medications'

rowId.description: the id of the derived row in `targetTable`

confidence.description: 0..1 confidence the analyst assigned to this extraction
